name: Cyber Eltanin
name_jp: サイバー・エルタニン
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing all LIGHT Machine monsters from your field and GY. This card's ATK/DEF become the number of monsters banished for its Special Summon x 500. If this card is Special Summoned: Send all other face-up monsters on the field to the GY.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing all LIGHT Machine monsters from your field and GY. This card's ATK/DEF become the number of monsters banished for its Special Summon x 500. If this card is Special Summoned: Send all other face-up monsters on the field to the GY.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing all LIGHT Machine monsters from your field and GY. This card's ATK/DEF become the number of monsters banished for its Special Summon x 500. If this card is Special Summoned: Send all other face-up monsters on the field to the GY.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Continuous, Trigger
action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
